texts.contactSectionSubtitle: Need Junk Gone? Contact Lucio’s Team
texts.contactSectionDescription: Strong service, clean results. We handle residential and commercial cleanouts in Fort Worth and the DFW area.
texts.bookPickupDescription: Fill out the form and we’ll call or text to confirm your appointment.
texts.footerCopyright: © 2026 Randalls Junk Removal. All rights reserved.
texts.gallerySectionDescription: Real jobs, real results. See how we handle every job with care and professionalism.
texts.galleryAlt1: Lucio's Junk Removal crew loading a truck in Fort Worth, TX
texts.galleryAlt2: Loaded hauling trailer after a residential junk removal job
texts.galleryAlt3: Construction debris loaded for removal from a job site
texts.galleryAlt4: Estate and property cleanout — furniture removed from a home
texts.galleryAlt5: Brush and yard debris removal from a residential property
texts.galleryAlt6: Clean driveway after professional junk removal service
texts.heroBadge: Junk Removal & Hauling — Fort Worth, TX
texts.heroTitle: Need Junk Gone Fast? We Haul It All.
texts.heroDescription: Fast, affordable junk removal and hauling for homes and businesses in Fort Worth, TX and surrounding communities. You point, we load, we haul it away.
texts.quoteFormDescription: Tell us what needs to go — we'll get back to you fast.
texts.quoteFormDetailsPlaceholder: Describe your project or any details we should know...
texts.quoteFormDisclaimer: By submitting, you agree to receive a call or text for your quote.
texts.serviceAreaSubtitle: Proudly Serving Fort Worth & the DFW Metroplex.
texts.serviceAreaDescription: Based in Fort Worth, TX, we provide junk removal, property cleanouts, hauling, and more to homeowners, contractors, and businesses across the DFW area.
texts.serviceAreaAvailability: Available in most areas — call for availability
texts.servicesSectionDescription: Junk removal, property cleanouts, hauling, and more for homeowners, contractors and businesses in Fort Worth, TX.
texts.serviceJunkRemovalDesc: Fast, reliable removal of unwanted items from homes, garages, basements, businesses, and properties throughout the DFW Metroplex. We handle the heavy lifting so you don't have to.
texts.serviceEstateCleanoutsDesc: Complete cleanouts for homes and properties. Whether you're handling an estate, preparing a property for sale, or downsizing, our crew removes everything fast.
texts.serviceConstructionDebrisDesc: Light demolition and construction debris removal for residential projects. From shed teardowns to full renovation cleanups, we haul away debris so your project can move forward.
texts.serviceBrushYardDesc: Yard and brush cleanup services for homeowners and contractors. We haul away tree limbs, brush piles, yard waste, storm debris, and old fencing.
texts.serviceMaterialHaulingDesc: Transportation and hauling services for bulk landscaping and construction materials. Whether you need materials delivered or hauled away, we've got the capacity.
texts.serviceStorageGarageDesc: Quick cleanouts for storage units, garages, sheds, and rental properties. We clear the space fast so it's ready for reuse.
texts.whyChooseUsDescription: We're not a franchise or a faceless hauling company. We're a local team that takes every job personally — fast, affordable, and always dependable.
texts.step1Desc: Call us or request a free quote online.
texts.step2Desc: We arrive on time with a professional crew.
texts.step3Desc: You point, we load, we sweep up after.
texts.featureSameDayDesc: Need it gone today? We offer same-day and next-day junk removal so you're not stuck waiting around.
texts.featureUpfrontPricingDesc: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. We quote before we start — prices include labor, loading, transportation, and disposal.
texts.featureProfessionalCrewDesc: Our team handles all the heavy lifting, loading, and hauling. You just point to what needs to go.
texts.featureEcoFriendlyDesc: We recycle and donate whenever possible. Responsible disposal means less waste in landfills.
texts.featureLicensedInsuredDesc: Fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind. Residential and commercial projects handled with care.
texts.featureLocallyOwnedDesc: Based in Fort Worth, TX. We live and work in the community we serve — our reputation depends on every job.
